free_text: Neutron-capture cross sections for osmium isotopes

tantalum target. Beam collimated with brass, borated
All samples are enriched metallic powders in light
Flight path of 14.7-meters. Samples used in
measurement also include C, 165Ho, natural Os, and
an empty can. Samples stepped through beam, steps are
approximately ten minutes each. Cadmium filter used
to eliminate pulse-to-pulse overlap. Yields converted
to cross sections using saturated resonance techniques
Two deuterated benzene scintillators, each with
6Li glass detector, NE905, used in measurement
Graphite foil used to determine shape of neutron flux.
